features.name: Fandom English Force
features.description: Automatically redirects non-English Fandom wiki pages to the English version.

features.name: Google Comma to Dot
features.description: Replaces commas with dots in Google search queries (useful for math).

features.name: Reddit tl Parameter Cleaner
features.description: Removes any `tl` query parameter from Reddit URLs to avoid unwanted translation tags.
